text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines and say hi in the welcome channel.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Jump into the welcome channel and we’ll get you oriented.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You’ve been approved as a member. Introduce yourself in the welcome channel when you’re ready.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Thanks for joining us—please introduce yourself in the welcome channel.
